channel.title: PA on Detention Pipeline
channel.description: Recent content in PA on Detention Pipeline

item.title: 287(g) JEM: Westmoreland County Sheriff’s Office (PA)

item.title: ACUITY-CHS, LLC — ICE BUCKS, PA $551,947
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: ACUITY-CHS, LLC Award ID: 70CMSD18P00000019 Amount: $551,947.00 Description: IGF::CT,CL::IGF PRE EMPLOYMENT MEDICAL SERVICES Period: 2018-01-26 to 2018-08-31 Location: BUCKS, PA (FIPS: 42017)

item.description:
IGSA detention facility: Bedford County Jail in Bedford County, PA.

item.title: CHENEGA TRI-SERVICES, LLC — ICE BLAIR, PA $4,602,050
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: CHENEGA TRI-SERVICES, LLC Award ID: 70CMSW19C00000001 Amount: $4,602,050.10 Description: OPERATIONS AND MAINTENANCE SERVICES FOR BROADVIEW, HUNTSVILLE, AND OAKDALE IRP FACILITIES Period: 2018-12-21 to 2023-12-20 Location: BLAIR, PA (FIPS: 42013)

item.description:
IGSA detention facility: Clarion County Corrections in Clarion County, PA.

Source: Vera Institute ICE Detention Trends (vera-institute/ice-detention-trends)

item.title: DATA SYSTEMS ANALYSTS INC — ICE BUCKS, PA $13,631,650
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: DATA SYSTEMS ANALYSTS INC Award ID: 70CTD020FR0000248 Amount: $13,631,649.50 Description: ICE REQUIRES CONTRACTOR SUPPORT TO PROVIDE O&M SERVICES FOR DHS/VINE TO PROVIDE CONTINUED AUTOMATED NOTIFICATION SERVICES TO VICTIMS HARMED BY ILLEGAL IMMIGRANTS. Period: 2020-09-22 to 2024-07-03 Location: BUCKS, PA (FIPS: 42017)

item.title: DATA SYSTEMS ANALYSTS INC — ICE BUCKS, PA $8,356,199
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: DATA SYSTEMS ANALYSTS INC Award ID: 70CTD024FR0000031 Amount: $8,356,199.19 Description: AMB #21163 NEW CONTRACT FOR VICTIM INFORMATION NOTIFICATION EXCHANGE (VINE) SUPPORT ANTICIPATED POP: 7/1/2024 - 6/30/2025 ACOR: ATA HAFEEZ, ATA.HAFEEZ@ICE.DHS.GOV, (202) 421-6222 Period: 2024-07-01 to 2026-06-30 Location: BUCKS, PA (FIPS: 42017)

item.title: FEDERAL CARTRIDGE COMPANY — ICE BLAIR, PA $2,277,778
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: FEDERAL CARTRIDGE COMPANY Award ID: HSCEMS11J00053 Amount: $2,277,778.27 Description: PURCHASE .223 62GR AMMO FOR USE BY AGENTS FOR DUTY AND TRAINING. CONTRACT # HSCEOP-06-D-00008; PART # XM223SPI. Period: 2011-08-11 to 2012-02-28 Location: BLAIR, PA (FIPS: 42013)

item.title: MCMANIS ASSOCIATES INC — ICE ERIE, PA $5,822,003
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: MCMANIS ASSOCIATES INC Award ID: 70CMSD20FR0000067 Amount: $5,822,002.74 Description: COMPREHENSIVE FEE SUPPORT SERVICES FOR THE STUDENT AND EXCHANGE VISITOR PROGRAM Period: 2020-07-14 to 2023-10-14 Location: ERIE, PA (FIPS: 42049)
